items.label: Family Member Relationship
items.form_text: Select the relationship between you (the derivative family member) and the I-914 principal applicant.
items.section: Part 1. Family Member For Whom You Are Filing

options.label: Unmarried Sibling Under 18 Years of Age

items.instruction: Select exactly one box. Verify against the I-914 principal's family composition.
items.where_to_verify: Intake; Bio Call; Birth Certificate(s); Marriage Certificate (if spouse)

items.label: Present-Danger Relationship
items.form_text: If filing as an adult or minor child who faces a present danger of retaliation, select the relationship to the principal family member.
items.section: Part 1. Family Member For Whom You Are Filing
items.condition: If you face a present danger of retaliation

options.label: Child of my parent (my sibling over 18)
Child of my unmarried sibling under 18 (my niece/nephew)

items.instruction: Only complete when the present-danger basis is asserted. Otherwise leave blank.
items.where_to_verify: Intake; Bio Call; Declaration; Birth Certificate(s)

items.label: Principal Applicant Full Legal Name
items.form_text: Full legal name of the I-914 principal applicant (your qualifying family member).
items.section: Part 2. General Information About You (the principal)
items.instruction: Must match the principal's I-914 Part 2 Item 1 exactly.
items.where_to_verify: Form I-914; Birth Certificate; Passport; Bio Call

items.label: Principal Date of Birth
items.form_text: Date of birth of the I-914 principal applicant.
items.section: Part 2. General Information About You (the principal)
items.instruction: Must match the principal's I-914 Part 2 DOB exactly.
items.where_to_verify: Form I-914; Birth Certificate; Passport; Bio Call

items.label: Principal A-Number
items.form_text: Alien Registration Number of the I-914 principal applicant.
items.section: Part 2. General Information About You (the principal)
items.instruction: Provide 7-9 digits without the leading 'A'. Leave blank if the principal has no A-Number yet.
items.where_to_verify: USCIS Receipt; I-797; Form I-914; Bio Call

items.label: Principal I-914 Status
items.form_text: Status of the principal's Form I-914, Application for T Nonimmigrant Status.
items.section: Part 2. General Information About You (the principal)

options.label: Filing this Form I-914, Supplement A together

items.instruction: Select exactly one. If pending or approved, attach the latest USCIS receipt or approval notice.
items.where_to_verify: USCIS Notice (I-797); USCIS Online Account; Case File; Intake

items.label: Your Full Legal Name (Derivative)
items.form_text: Your full legal name (the derivative family member filing this Supplement A).
items.section: Part 3. Information About Your Family Member (the derivative)
items.instruction: Match against the derivative's birth certificate or passport.
items.where_to_verify: Birth Certificate; Passport; Bio Call; Other ID

items.label: Other Names Used
items.form_text: List any other names you have used (aliases, maiden, nicknames).
items.section: Part 3. Information About Your Family Member (the derivative)
items.instruction: Add one entry per alias or maiden name. Leave the section blank if there are none.
items.where_to_verify: Bio Call; Passport/ID; Previous Docs; FBI Records (if any)

items.label: U.S. Physical or Intended Physical Address
items.form_text: Your U.S. physical address or intended U.S. address (if currently abroad).
items.section: Part 3. Information About Your Family Member (the derivative)
items.instruction: Use the actual residence. The safe mailing address goes in the next item.
items.where_to_verify: Bio Call; Proof of Address; Google Maps; Intake

items.label: Safe U.S. Mailing Address
items.form_text: Safe mailing address (only if different from your physical address).
items.section: Part 3. Information About Your Family Member (the derivative)

fields.label: In Care Of Name
fields.default_value: Law Offices of Manuel E. Solis, PLLC

items.instruction: Use the firm's safe-mailing address by default unless the client specifies a different secure mailbox.

items.label: A-Number
items.instruction: 7-9 digits. Leave blank if none.

items.label: USCIS Online Account Number
items.instruction: Exact value from myUSCIS.

items.label: U.S. Social Security Number
items.instruction: 9 digits, no dashes.
items.where_to_verify: SSN Card; Tax Records; Bio Call

items.label: Sex
items.instruction: Use the value reported in the derivative's identity document.

items.label: Marital Status
items.instruction: Current status as of filing.
items.where_to_verify: Marriage Certificate; Divorce Decree; Bio Call

items.label: Prior Marriages
items.condition: If you have any prior marriages
items.instruction: Attach divorce decree or death certificate for each entry.
items.where_to_verify: Divorce Decree; Death Certificate; Marriage Certificate; Bio Call

items.label: Date of Birth
items.instruction: Match the birth certificate or passport exactly.

items.label: Place of Birth (City / State / Country)
items.instruction: Match the country name as it appears on the passport.

items.label: Country of Citizenship or Nationality
items.instruction: Country name; not a nationality adjective.

items.label: Passport / Travel Document Number
items.instruction: Exact number from the bio page.

items.label: Country That Issued Passport / Travel Document
items.instruction: Issuing country name.

items.label: Passport Issue Date
items.instruction: Do NOT confuse with expiration date.

items.label: Passport Expiration Date
items.instruction: Do NOT confuse with issue date.

items.label: Current Immigration Status
items.instruction: Status, not citizenship or country. E.g. 'B-2 overstay', 'No Status', 'Parole'.

items.label: Currently Living in the United States?
items.instruction: Answer based on physical presence at the date of filing.
items.where_to_verify: Bio Call; Intake; Proof of Address; Travel Records

items.label: Applicant Signature
items.form_text: Signature of the derivative applicant on Part 5.
items.section: Part 5. Statement, Contact Information, Declaration, Certification, and Signature of the Applicant Who Is Filing This Supplement A
items.instruction: The derivative signs in ink at the time of submission; leave the value blank.

items.label: Date of Signature
items.section: Part 5. Statement, Contact Information, Declaration, Certification, and Signature of the Applicant Who Is Filing This Supplement A
items.instruction: Date the form is signed (typically the day of filing).

items.label: Additional Information
items.form_text: Use Part 8 to provide any additional information that did not fit elsewhere on this Supplement A.
items.instruction: Include Page/Part/Item for every entry. Use factual paragraphs; never copy generic boilerplate.
